confirmed_interpretation.label: meson spectroscopy correlator
confirmed_interpretation.summary: User explicitly asked for the grounded meson-spectroscopy correlator path with fixed gamma insertions.

convention_decisions.decision: Use the fixed wall-source meson-spectroscopy path with gamma5 and gamma4gamma5 insertion channels.
convention_decisions.why: The supported workflow is intentionally pinned to the exact correlator family already encoded in the local PyQUDA mesonspec test.

convention_decisions.decision: Use MomentumPhase with the grounded |p|^2<=9 momentum family from phase.getMomList(9).
convention_decisions.why: This keeps the workflow traceable to the exact local momentum-family construction used in the upstream mesonspec reference.

convention_decisions.decision: Contract the propagator with the fixed gamma5/gamma4gamma5 bilinear family using CuPy einsum over the local mesonspec tensor layout.
convention_decisions.why: The complete script should mirror the local mesonspec contraction path instead of inventing a generic spectroscopy helper API.

convention_decisions.decision: Keep this family narrow: gauge entry, Clover, wall source, fixed gamma insertion family, grounded momentum family, and npy tensor output.
convention_decisions.why: The goal is one fully grounded meson-spectroscopy path, not a shallow generic meson-correlator template.

external_citations.chosen_convention: Use a narrow meson-spectroscopy two-point workflow with fixed wall-source bilinears and a grounded finite-momentum family.
external_citations.knowledge_boundary_note: This citation record comes from a local curated JSON artifact, not from a live online lookup during the current run.
external_citations.title: Hadron Spectroscopy with Lattice QCD
external_citations.why_needed: The local PyQUDA mesonspec test provides the implementation path, while this curated review record documents the spectroscopy-side interpretation of the correlator family.

external_lookup.reason: External lookup is disabled by default. Re-run with --enable-external-lookup to allow live online lookup.

preflight_checks: Ensure all gauge inputs are visible from every rank before launch.
Ensure the output directory is writable by the rank that saves the final correlator artifact.
Confirm the nearest existing parent of each emitted artifact path is writable on the target filesystem before submission.
Verify numpy, cupy, pyquda_utils, and pyquda import successfully before starting a full inversion job.
Review the sibling .physics.json, .task.json, and .plan.json artifacts before cluster submission.
Keep gauge inputs on shared read-only storage and write new outputs to a dedicated writable results directory when possible.
handoff_contract.submission_assumption: Launch under an MPI/GPU layout consistent with GRID_SIZE and the target PyQUDA environment.
